case_title: OPORTUN, INC. VS. PAULO ROBERTO ESPINAL

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY OPORTUN, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT ESPINAL, PAULO ROBERTO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-25-2019 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-10-2020 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ESPINAL, PAULO ROBERTO $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $100.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,600.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

SMALL CLAIMS - CONTINUE ORDER (FOR JAN-10-2020 HEARING DATE) RETURNED. SENT TO: DEFENDANT (ENVELOPE MARKED:RETURNED TO SENDER - ATTEMPTED - NOT KNOWN - UNABLE TO FORWARD) AS TO DEFENDANT ESPINAL, PAULO ROBERTO

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-10-2020 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-10-2020 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY ANGEL GARCIA, LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST. DEFENDANT PAULO ROBERTO ESPINAL IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED TO DEFENDANT ON 01/14/20. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "RETURN TO SENDER - NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED - UNABLE TO FORWARD."
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $50.00 - SERVED SEP-09-2019, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT ESPINAL, PAULO ROBERTO

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-25-2019 - CONTINUED DUE TO THE CONDITION OF THE COURT CALENDAR TO JAN-10-2020 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. PARTIES WITH WORKING PHONE NUMBERS ON FILE WERE ADVISE. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
ORDER RE: CONTINUED ON COURT'S OWN MOTION. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
